profiling_summary: Hotspots: OpenMP barrier 22%, parallel region shows load imbalance, threads spend significant time waiting at synchronization points.

ranked_candidates.target: OpenMP loop execution stability via thread placement/affinity
ranked_candidates.rationale: Telemetry shows significant OpenMP barrier time (omp_barrier_pct=22%) and imbalance (omp_imbalance_ratio=1.8). The retrieved Lock Optimization pattern specifically targets OS scheduling/thread migration effects using CPU affinity/thread pinning to reduce synchronization stalls and improve consistent parallel execution.
ranked_candidates.action_sketch: Run with explicit OpenMP affinity settings to pin threads to cores and stabilize execution: set OMP_PROC_BIND=true and test OMP_PLACES=cores (and threads if SMT), optionally use spread/close to reduce contention. Keep code unchanged and rely on runtime env vars.
preconditions: OpenMP runtime supports OMP_PROC_BIND/OMP_PLACES (OpenMP 4.0+) and job scheduler allows binding (e.g., srun/numactl/taskset not conflicting)
correctness_checks: Verify CHECKSUM output matches baseline for fixed n and skew across all affinity/binding variants
rollback_criteria: Runtime increases or omp_barrier_pct/omp_imbalance_ratio worsen versus baseline with default binding
